samples.gvd:
module width_8to16 (
    input 				   clk,
    input 				   rst_n,
    input				      valid_in,
    input	   [7:0]		   data_in,
    output	reg			valid_out,
    output   reg [15:0]	data_out
);

reg [7:0] data_lock;
reg flag;
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		data_out <= 16'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in && flag) begin
			data_out <= {data_lock,data_in};
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		valid_out <= 1'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(flag) begin
			valid_out <= 1'b1;
		end
		else begin
			valid_out <= 1'b0;
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		flag <= 1'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in) begin
			flag <= ~flag;
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		data_lock <= 8'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in && !flag) begin
			data_lock <= data_in;
		end
	end
end
endmodule
